mapper.select: select id, code, name, parent_code, level, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted from tb_union_subject where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_union_subject(code, name, parent_code, level, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{code}, #{name}, #{parentCode}, #{level}, #{sort}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})

insert into tb_union_subject(code, name, parent_code, level, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values
(#{entity.code}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.parentCode}, #{entity.level}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.isDeleted})

insert into tb_union_subject(code, name, parent_code, level, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values
(#{entity.code}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.parentCode}, #{entity.level}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.isDeleted})
on duplicate key update code = values(code), name = values(name), parent_code = values(parent_code), level = values(level), sort = values(sort), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update:
update tb_union_subject
code = #{code},
name = #{name},
parent_code = #{parentCode},
level = #{level},
sort = #{sort},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
where id = #{id}
